policy.note: This guard validates the daily loop plan only. It does not execute tasks.

findings.message: Plan schema_version must be 0.1.
Plan status must be known.
Max loop tick must be at most two minutes.
Checkup interval must be at most three minutes.
Plan must prohibit idle waits between tasks.
Plan must start the next task immediately after completion.
Plan must not read private content.
Plan must not copy private content.
Plan must not run private OCR.
Plan must not run embeddings on private content.
Plan must not run fine-tuning.
Plan must not write public files.
Plan must not write public manifest.
Plan public-ready must remain 0.
Loop must target 18:00 local time.
Loop tick max must be at most two minutes.
Loop checkup interval must be at most three minutes.
Data lane should be review-only passed at plan time.
Worker boundary guard should pass at plan time.
Source Root should remain locked unless explicit owner answer exists.
Plan must include at least five work blocks.
Plan must include work block local_worker_conversion_governance.
Plan must include work block innovation_scout.
Plan must include work block references_schema_hardening.
Plan must include work block asset_schema_hardening.
Plan must include work block training_eval_readiness.
Plan must include work block orbit_and_handoff.
Local worker conversion governance must include the evidence ledger.
Innovation scout must include GitHub fixture skeletons.
Innovation scout must include GitHub fixture payloads.
Innovation scout must include GitHub fixture payload smoke.
Innovation scout must include GitHub worker integration signal bridge.
Innovation scout must include GitHub worker adapter boundary contract.
Innovation scout must include GitHub worker adapter boundary negative fixtures.
Innovation scout must include GitHub worker runtime batch readiness plan.
Innovation scout must include GitHub worker runtime rollback/redaction fixtures.
Innovation scout must include GitHub worker runtime apply guard.
Innovation scout must include GitHub worker runtime log-redaction negative fixtures.
Innovation scout must include GitHub worker runtime batch manifest draft.
Path A must include gated private metadata inventory.
Path B must explicitly block private scans.

next_actions: Use the plan as today loop entrypoint.
Run innovation scout next, then source-free references/assets/training blocks.
Refresh handoff and commit exact Codex-owned files after each coherent block.
